title: What Is Alpha Lipoic Acid and Does It Help Women Over 40?
seo_title: What Is Alpha Lipoic Acid for Women Over 40?
meta_description: Alpha lipoic acid is a universal antioxidant working in fat and water, supporting energy, blood sugar, and nerve health. See what the research shows for women over 40.
tags: Energy, Alpha Lipoic Acid, Antioxidant, Blood Sugar, Supplements, Women Over 40
